query_title: Werner and the Wizard of Booze

recommendations.title: The Cameraman's Revenge
recommendations.overview: A jilted husband takes his revenge by filming his wife and her lover and showing the result at the local cinema. This was one of Starewicz' first animated films, and stars a cast of animated beetles.

recommendations.title: Werner: Eat My Dust!!!
recommendations.overview: Because of a bet, Werner and his friend have to construct the fastest vehicle to win a race, because life depends on it.

recommendations.title: Werner - Volles Rooäää!!!
recommendations.overview: A wicked investor wants Werner's residential area razed to the ground in order to build a shopping center. However, building tycoon Günzelsen has not reckoned with Werner. Together with his master Röhrich he's planning to blow away the plumbings with

recommendations.title: Blood and Bone
recommendations.overview: In Los Angeles, an ex-con takes the underground fighting world by storm in his quest to fulfill a promise to a dead friend.

recommendations.title: Last Life in the Universe
recommendations.overview: An obsessive-compulsive Japanese librarian living in Bangkok spends most of his days contemplating suicide in his apartment. His life changes when he witnesses the death of a young girl and becomes acquainted with her elder sister.

recommendations.title: Zoom
recommendations.overview: A multi-dimensional interface between a comic book artist, a novelist, and a film director. Each lives in a separate reality but authors a story about one of the others.

recommendations.title: Mary and Max
recommendations.overview: A tale of friendship between two unlikely pen pals: Mary, a lonely, eight-year-old girl living in the suburbs of Melbourne, and Max, a forty-four-year old, severely obese man living in New York.

recommendations.title: Saw: Rebirth
recommendations.overview: This animated comic goes back in time to explore the events that spurred the transformation of mild-mannered John Kramer into the monstrous Jigsaw.

recommendations.title: Grande, grosso e... Verdone
recommendations.overview: A comic movie divided in three episodes.

recommendations.title: Gertie the Dinosaur
recommendations.overview: Although not the first feature-length animated film, as is sometimes thought, it was the first cartoon to feature a character with an appealing personality. The appearance of a true character distinguished it from earlier animated "trick films", such
